title: Spell-a-Beast
short_description: Spell the word to summon a beast — misspell it and you get an embarrassing mutant.
description: Spell each animal's name from a tray of letter tiles (with sneaky decoys) to summon it into your beast zoo. Misspell it and you summon a MUTANT instead — like a sheep that is mostly legs, or a creature that only eats homework and socks. Grade bands ramp from 3-letter beasts to big tricky ones like 'squirrel'. Teaches spelling and phonics with first-try and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap. Tap letter tiles to build the word, tap a placed tile to send it back, then press SUMMON.
